raw_consumer_statement:
I am being charged for baggage fees. We did not authorize baggage fees in any way. Spoke to the XXXX XXXX  and she assured me there would be no fee ( or bags were small enough to be considered a personal item ) however the charges came through. They have responded to the dispute with Barclays and taken the position that the terms and conditions for the account state that these fees are non-refundable. Just because the terms and conditions state that fees are non-refundable in general does not mean they can charge for anything they would like regardless of if you authorized the service. I spoke to XXXX XXXX badge number XXXX ) this evening and he understood what I was saying but the only way they would reconsider the dispute is if I would draft another letter ( sent through XXXX Mail ) and they would reconsider the dispute. They are making it intentionally difficult to solve an issue. There is no documented authorization for this fee. They are just assuming if they make it difficult enough the consumer will pay and give up. 

The case ID is XXXX
